worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "menu",
  "name": "Menu Module",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Digital menu management module providing menu, category, product, variant, and modifier CRUD operations with publishing and QR code support",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "core-feature",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "media"],
    "optional": ["ai"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "routes": true,
    "events": [
      "menu.created",
      "menu.updated",
      "menu.deleted",
      "menu.published",
      "menu.unpublished",
      "category.created",
      "category.updated",
      "category.deleted",
      "category.reordered",
      "product.created",
      "product.updated",
      "product.deleted",
      "product.availability.changed",
      "variant.created",
      "variant.updated",
      "variant.deleted",
      "modifier.created",
      "modifier.updated",
      "modifier.deleted",
      "theme.created",
      "theme.updated",
      "theme.deleted"
    ],
    "hooks": [
      "beforeMenuCreate",
      "afterMenuCreate",
      "beforeMenuPublish",
      "afterMenuPublish",
      "beforeProductCreate",
      "afterProductCreate",
      "beforeProductUpdate",
      "afterProductUpdate",
      "beforeCategoryCreate",
      "afterCategoryCreate"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "menu:read",
      "menu:create",
      "menu:update",
      "menu:delete",
      "menu:publish",
      "category:read",
      "category:create",
      "category:update",
      "category:delete",
      "product:read",
      "product:create",
      "product:update",
      "product:delete",
      "variant:read",
      "variant:create",
      "variant:update",
      "variant:delete",
      "modifier:read",
      "modifier:create",
      "modifier:update",
      "modifier:delete",
      "theme:read",
      "theme:create",
      "theme:update",
      "theme:delete"
    ],
    "services": [
      "MenuService",
      "CategoryService",
      "ProductService",
      "VariantService",
      "ModifierService",
      "ThemeService"
    ]
  },

  "requires": {
    "permissions": ["auth:verify", "organization:read", "media:upload"],
    "events": ["organization.created"]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "free",
    "features": {
      "free": ["basic_menu", "single_menu", "max_50_products"],
      "starter": ["multiple_menus", "max_200_products", "custom_themes"],
      "professional": ["unlimited_products", "advanced_modifiers", "nutrition_info"],
      "business": ["ai_descriptions", "bulk_import", "analytics"],
      "enterprise": ["api_access", "white_label", "custom_integrations"]
    }
  },

  "lifecycle": {
    "install": "lifecycle/install.ts",
    "uninstall": "lifecycle/uninstall.ts",
    "activate": "lifecycle/activate.ts",
    "deactivate": "lifecycle/deactivate.ts",
    "upgrade": "lifecycle/upgrade.ts"
  },

  "admin": {
    "menu": {
      "label": "Menus",
      "icon": "ph-list-bullets",
      "route": "/admin/menus",
      "order": 20,
      "hidden": false
    },
    "submenu": [
      {
        "label": "All Menus",
        "route": "/admin/menus",
        "icon": "ph-list",
        "order": 1
      },
      {
        "label": "Categories",
        "route": "/admin/menus/categories",
        "icon": "ph-folders",
        "order": 2
      },
      {
        "label": "Products",
        "route": "/admin/menus/products",
        "icon": "ph-package",
        "order": 3
      },
      {
        "label": "Themes",
        "route": "/admin/menus/themes",
        "icon": "ph-palette",
        "order": 4
      }
    ]
  },

  "settings": {
    "schema": "settings.schema.json",
    "defaults": {
      "defaultCurrency": "TRY",
      "enableVariants": true,
      "enableModifiers": true,
      "enableNutritionInfo": false,
      "enableAllergens": true,
      "maxCategoriesPerMenu": 50,
      "maxProductsPerCategory": 100,
      "maxVariantsPerProduct": 10,
      "maxModifiersPerProduct": 20,
      "maxImagesPerProduct": 10,
      "imageMaxSizeKb": 2048,
      "slugAutoGenerate": true
    }
  }
}
